views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's hydration progress with an animated progress ring, live intake counter, beverage breakdown donut, quick-add floating buttons for common containers, current streak badge, and a timeline of today's drinks

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal with container size presets for one-tap logging, beverage type picker with hydration factor display, custom amount stepper, and optional note field

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Scrollable calendar heatmap colored by daily goal completion percentage, tappable days revealing detailed entry logs, date range filtering, and beverage type filter chips

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly and monthly bar charts of effective hydration, beverage type distribution pie chart, hourly intake pattern chart showing when user drinks most, goal achievement rate over time, trend comparison (this week vs last week), and AI-generated hydration insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMl
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all amountMl entries for today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEffectiveHydration
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of amountMl * hydrationFactor for today, representing actual hydration contribution (coffee counts as 0.8x, juice as 0.9x, water as 1.0x)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayEffectiveHydration / dailyGoalMl as 0.0-1.0 fraction for progress ring

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGlassesCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of individual drink entries logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayBeverageBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (beverage type, total ml) pairs for today, sorted by amount descending, used for donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where effectiveHydration >= dailyGoalMl, ending at yesterday (today in progress doesn't break streak)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageMl
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily effective hydration over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change of this week's average vs previous week's average, positive means improvement

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days of (date, effectiveHydration) pairs for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 30 days of (date, effectiveHydration) pairs for trend line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hourlyDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 24-element array where index is hour (0-23) and value is average ml consumed at that hour across all history, reveals peak hydration times

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalAchievementRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of tracked days where daily goal was met, over the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hydrationInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of computed insight objects: best hydration day of week, most common beverage, peak drinking hour, streak motivations, dehydration risk alerts for low-intake days, weekend vs weekday comparison

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTimelineEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Today's entries sorted chronologically for the dashboard timeline view

viewModelComputedProperties.name: remainingToGoal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Max(0, dailyGoalMl - todayEffectiveHydration) — how many ml still needed today

dailyGoal.description: Default daily hydration goal in milliliters. WHO recommends ~2000ml for women, ~2500ml for men. User can customize. The goal is measured in effective hydration (adjusted by hydration factor), not raw volume.

hydrationFactors.description: Each beverage type has a hydration effectiveness multiplier: water=1.0, sparklingWater=1.0, herbalTea=0.95, tea=0.9, juice=0.85, smoothie=0.85, milk=0.9, sportsDrink=0.95, coffee=0.8, other=0.9. Coffee's diuretic effect reduces its hydration contribution. These factors multiply the raw ml to get effective hydration.

containerDefaults.description: Preset container sizes for one-tap quick logging: sip=100ml, smallGlass=200ml, glass=250ml, mug=350ml, bottle=500ml, largeBottle=750ml. Custom allows free stepper input. Selecting a container auto-fills amountMl.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as 'active' (streak-continuing) if the total effective hydration (sum of amountMl * hydrationFactor for all entries that day) meets or exceeds the daily goal. Today is excluded from streak calculation — the streak shows consecutive completed days ending at yesterday, so a user won't lose their streak mid-day.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Weekly trend compares the average daily effective hydration of the current 7-day window vs the previous 7-day window, expressed as percentage change. Monthly trend uses 30-day rolling average. Hourly distribution analysis identifies the user's natural drinking pattern (morning-heavy, even, evening-heavy) and flags gaps longer than 3 hours during waking hours as potential dehydration risk windows.
insights: Peak hydration hour: the hour of day when user consistently drinks the most, with personalized tip
Beverage diversity score: how many different beverage types used in the last 7 days, encouraging variety
Weekend vs weekday comparison: average intake difference, with motivational nudge if weekends are significantly lower
Streak milestone celebrations: badges at 3, 7, 14, 30, 60, 90, 180, 365 day streaks
Dehydration risk alert: flags days where intake was below 50% of goal by 3pm
Best day of week: which weekday historically has highest hydration, reinforcing positive patterns
Consistency score: standard deviation of daily intake — lower means more consistent habit
Coffee-to-water ratio: if coffee entries exist, show ratio and suggest balance if coffee exceeds 30% of total
